incident.error_summary: LLM access is disabled in 'medical-rag' service due to demo error mode.

correlation_chain: LLM access is disabled in 'medical-rag' service due to demo error mode

timeline.event: LLM access is disabled (demo error mode). Click 'Enable LLM Access' in the chat UI to restore.

root_cause_candidate.reason: The error is explicitly stated as LLM access being disabled in 'medical-rag' service due to demo error mode, with no upstream dependencies or external factors indicated in the logs.

analysis.analysis_summary: The 'medical-rag' service experienced a single error where LLM access was disabled due to demo error mode, impacting its functionality.

errors.error_message: LLM access is disabled (demo error mode). Click 'Enable LLM Access' in the chat UI to restore.
errors.evidence: [langfuse:1] | ts=2026-04-10T04:19:55.204Z | svc=medical-rag | level=ERROR | msg=Trace 'medical-rag' | Error: LLM access is disabled (demo error mode). Click 'Enable LLM Access' in the chat UI to restore.

error_impacts.impact_description: The service was unable to access the LLM, preventing it from processing queries that require LLM capabilities.

rca.rca_summary: The root cause of the incident was a configuration error in the 'medical-rag' service where LLM access was disabled due to the service being set to demo error mode. This prevented the service from accessing the LLM, impacting its functionality.

root_cause.description: The 'medical-rag' service was configured in demo error mode, which disabled LLM access. This configuration setting directly caused the service to be unable to process queries requiring LLM capabilities.
evidence: [langfuse:1] | ts=2026-04-10T04:19:55.204Z | svc=medical-rag | level=ERROR | msg=Trace 'medical-rag' | Error: LLM access is disabled (demo error mode). Click 'Enable LLM Access' in the chat UI to restore.

causal_chain.source_event: medical-rag service set to demo error mode
causal_chain.evidence: [langfuse:1] | ts=2026-04-10T04:19:55.204Z | svc=medical-rag | level=ERROR | msg=Trace 'medical-rag' | Error: LLM access is disabled (demo error mode). Click 'Enable LLM Access' in the chat UI to restore.

causal_chain.target_event: medical-rag service unable to process LLM queries
causal_chain.evidence: [langfuse:1] | ts=2026-04-10T04:19:55.204Z | svc=medical-rag | level=ERROR | msg=Trace 'medical-rag' | Error: LLM access is disabled (demo error mode). Click 'Enable LLM Access' in the chat UI to restore.

failure_timeline.event: LLM access is disabled due to demo error mode
Service unable to process LLM queries

recommendations.recommendation_summary: To resolve the incident, reconfigure the 'medical-rag' service to disable demo error mode and enable LLM access. This will restore the service's ability to process queries requiring LLM capabilities.

solutions.title: Disable Demo Error Mode in 'medical-rag' Service
solutions.description: Reconfigure the 'medical-rag' service to disable demo error mode and enable LLM access. This will directly address the root cause by allowing the service to access the LLM and process queries as intended.
solutions.expected_outcome: The 'medical-rag' service will regain access to the LLM, restoring its full functionality.

recommendations.root_cause_addressed: The 'medical-rag' service was configured in demo error mode, which disabled LLM access.
